evaluators.name: Beginner Leadership Courses Cart Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user added the two cheapest qualifying beginner-level leadership courses (≤$100, rating ≥4.0) to their cart.

evaluators.name: Small-Business Consulting Proposal Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a proposal request for a qualifying small-business consulting package (≥10 hours/month, < $1,200) and chose the cheapest such package.

evaluators.name: Top In-Person Workshops Training Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved the top three in-person leadership/change-management workshops (1–2 days, highest rating) into their training plan.

evaluators.name: Earliest Morning Coaching Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a 60-minute coaching session in the earliest available morning slot next week between 09:00 and 12:00.

evaluators.name: Technology Case Studies Saved Items Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user saved three technology case studies with budget > $20,000 and duration < 6 months.

evaluators.name: Remote Teams Newsletter Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user subscribed for weekly emails about remote leadership and team productivity from the third most popular remote-teams article.

evaluators.name: On-Site Workshop Pricing Configuration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user configured an on-site 2-day workshop for 25 participants with follow-up group coaching under $8,000 and used it in a proposal request.

evaluators.name: North America Leadership Consultant Contact Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user contacted a North America–based leadership development consultant with ≥10 years experience and ≥5 clients, and whether they contacted the most experienced such consultant.
